---
id: create-secret
title: "CreateSecret"
description: "Creates a new encrypted secret with the specified name and value. The secret is encrypted with the workspace's current encryption key. Secret values are never returned in responses for security."
sidebar_label: "CreateSecret"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/superposition
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"CreateSecret"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/secrets"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates a new encrypted secret with the specified name and value. The secret is encrypted with the workspace's current encryption key. Secret values are never returned in responses for security.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
